tasks.title: Confirm the build approach
tasks.expectedOutput: Implementation plan with boundaries, risks, tests, and handoff notes
tasks.resultSummary: Architecture response recorded. Canonical package and approved Blueprint control implementation scope.

tasks.title: Implement the approved package
tasks.requiredInput: Founder-approved Natural Nation Day 1 member-facing foundation under app/frontend.
tasks.expectedOutput: A real GitHub pull request with implementation and validation evidence.
tasks.resultSummary: Implementation created through the protected repository adapter. GitHub pull request: https://github.com/Natural-Nation-MVP/natural-nation-mvp/pull/30. Changed files: app/frontend/README.md, app/frontend/app.js, app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/styles.css, app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs. Validation evidence is included in app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs.

tasks.title: Review the experience
tasks.requiredInput: Review only PR #30 and these exact files: app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/styles.css, app/frontend/app.js, app/frontend/README.md, app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs. Known facts: the dashboard contains Day 1 Journey, Wellness Score 85, Rejuvenation Score 92, Duey identified as an AI wellness mentor, five timed protocol items, and Daily Check-in controls. styles.css has responsive breakpoints at 768px and 1024px but no explicit focus-visible rules. app.js uses browser alerts, duplicate click listeners, console-only check-in data, and no persistence. The Duey image uses an external placeholder URL. Do not invent React, src/ files, screenshots, user testing, or simulated evidence. Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact contract: {"type":"experience_review","summary":"plain-English review","passes":["finding"],"issues":["finding"],"mergeBlockers":["blocker"],"recommendation":"approve|changes_required","evidence":[{"path":"app/frontend/index.html","finding":"specific evidence"}]}. Every evidence path must be one of the five approved app/frontend paths.
tasks.expectedOutput: A schema-valid experience_review JSON object containing passes, issues, merge blockers, recommendation, and file-based evidence

retryContext.reason: Gemini returned incomplete or simulated narrative evidence.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Return only the deterministic experience_review JSON contract tied to the five real app/frontend files.

tasks.title: Prepare the Founder review
tasks.requiredInput: Verified PR #30 implementation evidence and the schema-valid Gemini experience_review result. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"type":"founder_review","decision":"approve|request_changes|reject","comments":["what changed and what passed"],"risks":["remaining risk"],"nextAction":"exact Founder action required"}.
tasks.expectedOutput: A schema-valid founder_review JSON object with decision, comments, risks, and nextAction

tasks.title: Approve or request changes
tasks.requiredInput: Verified build pull request, validation evidence, deterministic experience review, and deterministic Founder summary
